message:
chore(audit,beads): sync tracking files for recent audit batches

Updates audit_index.jsonl with 20+ new audit entries covering codec,
distributed encoding, grpc, http, io, lab, messaging, process, remote,
runtime/builder, sync/pool, and web modules. Beads issue tracker synced
with recently closed and updated beads from multi-agent session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
